'''âm-b-g''' ('''mabaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:centralise|centralise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:centralise|centralise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| mabaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabagithi|mabagithi]] || [[word:mabagiji|mabagiji]] || [[word:mabagishi|mabagishi]] || [[word:mabagi|mabagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabaguthuth|mabaguthuth]] || [[word:mabagujuj|mabagujuj]] || [[word:mabagushush|mabagushush]] || [[word:mabag|mabag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabaguthu|mabaguthu]] || [[word:mabaguju|mabaguju]] || [[word:mabagushu|mabagushu]] || [[word:mabagu|mabagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabagufuth|mabagufuth]] || [[word:mabagufuj|mabagufuj]] || [[word:mabagufush|mabagufush]] || [[word:mabaguf|mabaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabagethe|mabagethe]] || [[word:mabageje|mabageje]] || [[word:mabageshe|mabageshe]] || [[word:mabage|mabage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabagothoth|mabagothoth]] || [[word:mabagojoj|mabagojoj]] || [[word:mabagoshosh|mabagoshosh]] || [[word:mabag|mabag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabagotho|mabagotho]] || [[word:mabagojo|mabagojo]] || [[word:mabagosho|mabagosho]] || [[word:mabago|mabago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabagofoth|mabagofoth]] || [[word:mabagofoj|mabagofoj]] || [[word:mabagofosh|mabagofosh]] || [[word:mabagof|mabagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mabagĂŠthĂŠ|mabagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mabagĂŠjĂŠ|mabagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mabagĂŠshĂŠ|mabagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mabagĂŠ|mabagĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mabagathath|mabagathath]] || [[word:mabagajaj|mabagajaj]] || [[word:mabagashash|mabagashash]] || [[word:mabag|mabag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mabagatha|mabagatha]] || [[word:mabagaja|mabagaja]] || [[word:mabagasha|mabagasha]] || [[word:mabaga|mabaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mabagafath|mabagafath]] || [[word:mabagafaj|mabagafaj]] || [[word:mabagafash|mabagafash]] || [[word:mabagaf|mabagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mabagasha|mabagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomabagasha|gomabagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimabagasha|gokimabagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mabagnĂŒsha|mabagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomabagnknĂŒsha|gomabagnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimabagnĂŒsha|gokimabagnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mabagshĂ«sha|mabagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomabagnkshĂ«sha|gomabagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimabagshĂ«sha|gokimabagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabagrosha|mabagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabagnkrosha|gomabagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabagrosha|gokimabagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mabagmusha|mabagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabagnkmusha|gomabagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabagmusha|gokimabagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mabagsherasha|mabagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomabagnksherasha|gomabagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimabagsherasha|gokimabagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mabagngasha|mabagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomabagnkngasha|gomabagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimabagngasha|gokimabagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mabagyasha|mabagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomabagnkyasha|gomabagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimabagyasha|gokimabagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mabagyamasha|mabagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomabagnkyamasha|gomabagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimabagyamasha|gokimabagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mabagnĂŒshĂ«sha|mabagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomabagnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomabagnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimabagnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimabagnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabagnĂŒrosha|mabagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabagnknĂŒrosha|gomabagnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabagnĂŒrosha|gokimabagnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabagnĂŒmusha|mabagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabagnknĂŒmusha|gomabagnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabagnĂŒmusha|gokimabagnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mabagshĂ«nĂŒsha|mabagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomabagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomabagnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimabagshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimabagshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabagshĂ«rosha|mabagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabagnkshĂ«rosha|gomabagnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabagshĂ«rosha|gokimabagshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabagshĂ«musha|mabagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabagnkshĂ«musha|gomabagnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabagshĂ«musha|gokimabagshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mabagronĂŒsha|mabagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomabagnkronĂŒsha|gomabagnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimabagronĂŒsha|gokimabagronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mabagroshĂ«sha|mabagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomabagnkroshĂ«sha|gomabagnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimabagroshĂ«sha|gokimabagroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mabagromusha|mabagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomabagnkromusha|gomabagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimabagromusha|gokimabagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mabagmunĂŒsha|mabagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomabagnkmunĂŒsha|gomabagnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimabagmunĂŒsha|gokimabagmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mabagmushĂ«sha|mabagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomabagnkmushĂ«sha|gomabagnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimabagmushĂ«sha|gokimabagmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mabagmurosha|mabagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomabagnkmurosha|gomabagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimabagmurosha|gokimabagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mabag|mabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠbĂŠg|mĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homabag|homabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠbĂŠg|homĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomabag|hohomabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠbĂŠg|hohomĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmabag|nĂŒmabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠbĂŠg|nĂŒmĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmabag|nĂŒnĂŒmabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠbĂŠg|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmabag|nĂŻmabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠbĂŠg|nĂŻmĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmabag|nĂŻnĂŻmabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠbĂŠg|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumabag|lumabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠbĂŠg|lumĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumabag|lulumabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠbĂŠg|lulumĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limabag|limabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠbĂŠg|limĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimabag|lilimabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠbĂŠg|lilimĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komabag|komabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠbĂŠg|komĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomabag|kokomabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠbĂŠg|kokomĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemabag|kemabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠbĂŠg|kemĂŠbĂŠg]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemabag|kekemabag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠbĂŠg|kekemĂŠbĂŠg]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
